texto: The number one thing I look for is personality. For me, the personality of someone makes them more and more attractive over time ... and for those with bad personalities, less and less attractive. I look for honesty, intelligence, kindness, and a good work ethic, to name a few.
explicacao: Citação de Manika sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The number one thing I look for is personality. For me, the personality of someone makes them mor…” articula inteligencia, work, kindness em registro de inteligencia, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e kindness.
